name: Nexus: Aftermath - Custom Apocalypse Framework
author: NexusDev
description: A completely custom standalone FiveM apocalypse framework with 0 ESX/QBCore dependencies. Features Neural Infection, Echo Memory, Scavenger AI, Tether System, Radio Physics, and Dynamic World Evolution.

config.serverDescription: An apocalypse like no other. The world remembers everything.

serverCfgTemplate:
# Nexus: Aftermath - Generated by txAdmin Recipe
# =================================================

# Server identity
sv_hostname "{serverName}"
sv_master1 ""
sv_tags "{tags}"
sets sv_projectName "Nexus: Aftermath"
sets sv_projectDesc "{serverDescription}"

# Server connection
sv_maxclients {maxPlayers}

# Networking
onesync_enabled true
onesync_population true
onesync_distanceCulling 200

# Game settings
sv_scriptHookAllowed false
sv_enforceGameBuild {gameBuild}

# Resources
ensure oxmysql
execute {oxmysql.configFile}
ensure ox_lib
ensure nexus_apocalypse

# Nexus: Aftermath Configuration
set na_debug "{na_debug}"
set na_max_players "{na_max_players}"
set na_world_tier "{na_world_tier}"
set na_infection_rate "{na_infection_rate}"
set na_resource_mult "{na_resource_mult}"

# Database
set mysql_host "{mysql_host}"
set mysql_port "{mysql_port}"
set mysql_database "{mysql_database}"
set mysql_username "{mysql_username}"
set mysql_password "{mysql_password}"

# Admins (add your identifiers below)
# add_principal identifier.steam:110000100000000 group.admin
# add_principal identifier.license:xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx group.admin

steps.title: Welcome to Nexus: Aftermath
steps.description:
This recipe will set up a complete custom apocalypse FiveM server with 0 ESX/QBCore dependencies.

Unique features:
- Neural Infection System (4 strains, 5 stages, mutations)
- Echo Memory (death persistence)
- Scavenger AI with memory
- Tether System (share health/inventory)
- Radio Physics (range, jamming, encryption)
- Dynamic World Evolution
- Structural Building Physics

Duration: ~2-3 minutes
Dependencies required: oxmysql, ox_lib

steps.query: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {databaseName}; USE {databaseName}; SOURCE {schemaFilePath};

steps.title: Setup Complete!
steps.description:
Nexus: Aftermath has been installed successfully!

Next steps:
1. Add your Steam ID to the admins list in server.cfg
2. Set your database password in server.cfg if needed
3. Start your server and join!

Default keybinds:
- TAB: Open Inventory
- R: Open Radio
- C: Open Crafting
- E: Scan for Echoes
- B: Build Mode
- F7: Toggle HUD
